pet_notes: Create an original copyright-safe Japanese guardian fox mascot. Compact chibi fox anatomy, warm protective expression, white fur, vermilion-red inner ears, paws, single tail tip, and restrained symmetrical flame-like forehead and cheek markings with deep indigo outlines. Exactly ONE large curled tail in every image and every animation frame. No mask prop and no fan of tails. Broadly approachable fox proportions only; do not copy any Pokemon character silhouette, face, fur collar, palette layout, or markings.
style_notes: Crisp polished flat-vector sticker sprite with consistent indigo outline thickness, simple cel shading, rounded readable shapes, and fixed white/vermilion/indigo palette. Preserve exact face, markings, proportions, and single-tail silhouette across every row.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `flat-vector`: Flat vector-style mascot with simple geometric forms, crisp color areas, clean outline, and minimal shading. User style notes: Crisp polished flat-vector sticker sprite with consistent indigo outline thickness, simple cel shading, rounded readable shapes, and fixed white/vermilion/indigo palette. Preserve exact face, markings, proportions, and single-tail silhouette across every row..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
